clean_room_replication.evidence: Clean-room temp run reproduced pipeline outputs after the stake-simulation gate fix: 10 predictions, 0 recommendations, production stakes zero, and safety-filtered educational profile summaries bound to current prediction/metrics hashes.

data_lineage.evidence: Manual odds 497 rows match provenance; fixture/result/odds/prediction coverage all align; manual rows preserve source hash; promo values normalized true/false; 268 complete market groups have zero duplicate or invalid selection sets; 1X2 canonical values are home/draw/away and double-chance values are home_or_draw/home_or_away/draw_or_away.

deployment_reliability.evidence: CI order is structurally correct: field audit, role release validation, report generation, site build, pytest, Pages deploy, then live validation. Report fetch path and build copy path for release_validation_june22_27.json are consistent. Prior BLOCKED status was solely due to missing registry/generated artifact and uncommitted local changes.

ml_methodology.evidence: Chronological date-block split, proper-score metrics, model comparison/promotion gates, and research-mode limits are acceptable only for fail-closed development publication. Actionable betting, profitability, model promotion, and confirmatory performance claims remain blocked.

profitability_staking.evidence: Historical closing-odds primary validation rows/events are zero; ROI/CLV/profitability are blocked. Metrics mark recommendations blocked and bankroll prohibited_zero_allocation; all ranked comparisons are ABSTAIN; recommendation fields are null; production bankroll stakes are zero. The educational stake simulation is separate, hypothetical only, and safety-filtered by EV, stressed EV, fair price, and selected risk lens.

report_ui_editor.evidence: JSON/report parity, top-four comparisons, bilingual report assumptions, newbie tooltips, mobile diagnostics, and the safety-filtered stake simulator user flow are sound. The simulator exposes budget/risk controls and labels gross as not profit while production authorization remains zero.

storm_moderator.evidence: Design covers seven required perspectives, exact byte/semantic hash binding, fail-closed missing-role/non-PASS/duplicate-role checks, audit-summary binding, and profitability fail-closed checks. Moderator initially BLOCKED only because this registry was absent.
